calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reinstate Petitioner Shadhika Project, Inc. As An Active California Nonprofit Corporation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER IN RE SHADHIKA PROJECT, INC's Motion To Reinstate Petitioner Shadhika Project, Inc. As An Active California Nonprofit Corporation.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "motion to reinstate petitioner Shadhika Project, Inc. as an active California nonprofit corporation" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
